hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMS" | grep -q '\.rs"'; then cd "C:/Users/tateb/Documents/opusprogram" && C:/Users/tateb/.cargo/bin/rustfmt.exe --edition 2021 $(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMS" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+\.rs') 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMS" | grep -q '\.rs"'; then cd "C:/Users/tateb/Documents/opusprogram/chronicler-agents" && cargo check --quiet 2>&1 | head -20; fi
hooks.description: Type-check Rust crate after editing .rs files

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMS" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd "C:/Users/tateb/Documents/opusprogram" && C:/Users/tateb/.cargo/bin/cargo-clippy.exe --manifest-path chronicler-agents/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings 2>&1 && PATH="$PATH:C:/Users/tateb/.cargo/bin" cargo nextest run --manifest-path chronicler-agents/Cargo.toml 2>&1; fi
hooks.description: Run clippy + nextest before git commits
